recommendations.title: Half Baked
recommendations.overview: Three lovable party buds try to bail their friend out of jail. But just when the guys have mastered a plan, everything comes dangerously close to going up in smoke.

recommendations.title: Billy Madison

recommendations.title: CB4
recommendations.overview: A "rockumentary", covering the rise to fame of MC Gusto, Stab Master Arson, and Dead Mike: members of the rap group "CB4". We soon learn that these three are not what they seem and don't appear to know as much about rap music as they claim... but a l

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: Nowhere Boy
recommendations.overview: A rebellious teenager, future Beatle John Lennon lives with his Aunt Mimi in working-class mid-1950s Liverpool, England. Mimi's husband suddenly dies, and John spies his mother Julia at the funeral. Despite Mimi's misgivings, John intends to have a r

recommendations.title: The Fundamentals of Caring
recommendations.overview: Having suffered a tragedy, Ben becomes a caregiver to earn money. His first client, Trevor, is a hilarious 18-year-old with muscular dystrophy. One paralyzed emotionally, one paralyzed physically, Ben and Trevor hit the road on a trip into the wester

recommendations.title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
recommendations.overview: On a trekking trip, an introverted Naina falls for a charming ex-classmate, whose thirst for adventure drives them apart. Years later, their paths cross again.

recommendations.title: Book Club: The Next Chapter
recommendations.overview: Four best friends take their book club to Italy for the fun girls' trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime cross-country adventure.

recommendations.title: Am I OK?

recommendations.title: Fire Island
recommendations.overview: A group of queer best friends gather in the Fire Island Pines for their annual week of love and laughter. However, desires, dramas, drink and drugs push their bonds to the limits.
